questions.question: The total fertility rate in an economy is defined as:

options.A: the number of children born per 1000 people in the population in a year
options.B: the number of children born to a couple in their lifetime in a given population
options.C: the birth rate minus death rate
options.D: the average number of live births a woman would have by the end of her child-bearing age

questions.subject: Economy

questions.question: In the context of any country, which one of the following would be considered as part of its social capital?

options.A: The proportion of literates in the population
options.B: The stock of its buildings, other infrastructure and machines
options.C: The size of population in the working age group
options.D: The level of mutual trust and harmony in the society

questions.question: Consider the following statements about Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups (PVTGs) in India: 1. PVTGs reside in 18 States and one Union Territory. 2. A stagnant or declining population is one of the criteria for determining PVTG status. 3. There are 95 PVTGs officially notified in the country so far. 4. Irular and Konda Reddi tribes are included in the list of PVTGs. Which of the statements given above are correct?

questions.question: Consider the following statements: Human capital formation as a concept is better explained in terms of a process which enables 1.
